call_graphs.name: auth.signin-oauth-roundtrip
call_graphs.hint: entry: src/app/signin/page.tsx:SignInContent → authClient.signIn.oauth2({providerId, callbackURL}) → MP /oauth/connect/authorize → MP callback to /api/auth/oauth2/callback/ministry-platform → src/app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts:GET (toNextJsHandler(auth)) → auth.ts:genericOAuth.getUserInfo(tokens) → fetch ${MP_BASE_URL}/oauth/connect/userinfo → auth.ts:genericOAuth.mapProfileToUser(profile) → Better Auth createOAuthUser → customSession(user,session) (name split) → set cookie → 302 to callbackURL

call_graphs.name: auth.protected-route-gate
call_graphs.hint: entry: any /tools/* request → src/proxy.ts:proxy(request) → getSessionCookie(request) → (cookie present) pass through with x-pathname header → src/app/(web)/layout.tsx → src/components/layout/auth-wrapper.tsx:AuthWrapper → auth.api.getSession({headers}) → (no session) redirect(/signin?callbackUrl=<x-pathname>) OR render children

call_graphs.name: auth.signout-oidc-endsession
call_graphs.hint: entry: src/components/user-menu/actions.ts:handleSignOut → auth.api.signOut({headers}) (clears BA cookie) → redirect(${MP_BASE_URL}/oauth/connect/endsession?post_logout_redirect_uri=${APP_URL}) → MP clears session → 302 back to APP_URL → proxy sees no cookie → /signin

call_graphs.name: contexts.client-profile-load
call_graphs.hint: entry: src/contexts/user-context.tsx:UserProvider mount → authClient.useSession() → read (session.user as {userGuid}).userGuid → getCurrentUserProfile(userGuid) (server action) → UserService.getUserProfile → Promise.all(MPHelper.getTableRecords dp_Users + dp_User_Roles + dp_User_User_Groups) → setUserProfile

call_graphs.name: mp.token-acquisition-cold
call_graphs.hint: entry: MPHelper.anyMethod → Provider.delegates → Service.method → this.client.ensureValidToken() [client.ts:49] → (expiresAt < now) → getClientCredentialsToken() [client-credentials.ts:3] → POST {baseUrl}/oauth/connect/token → this.token = access_token; this.expiresAt = now + TOKEN_LIFE → HttpClient.get/post with Authorization: Bearer ${this.token}

call_graphs.name: mp.token-refresh-warm
call_graphs.hint: entry: Service.method → this.client.ensureValidToken() → (expiresAt >= now) → early return → HttpClient with cached token. No network call for auth.

call_graphs.name: mp.dev-token-pipeline
call_graphs.hint: entry: ProcedureService.executeProcedure('api_dev_DeployTool', ...) → this.client.ensureValidDevToken() → getClientCredentialsToken('dev') → resolveCredentials('dev') → reads MINISTRY_PLATFORM_DEV_CLIENT_ID/SECRET → POST /oauth/connect/token → this.devToken = access_token → getDevHttpClient().post('/procs/api_dev_DeployTool', ...)

call_graphs.name: mp.validation-short-circuit
call_graphs.hint: entry: MPHelper.createTableRecords(table, records, { schema }) → records.map(record => schema.parse(record)) → on failure: throw Error('Validation failed for record ${i}: ...') — API call never made. On success: provider.createTableRecords → TableService → HttpClient.post

call_graphs.name: mp.deploy-tool
call_graphs.hint: entry: src/components/dev-panel/panels/deploy-tool-actions.ts:deployTool → ToolService.deployTool → MPHelper.executeProcedureWithBody → ProcedureService.executeProcedureWithBody → isDevProcedure(true) → client.ensureValidDevToken + getDevHttpClient → HttpClient.post('/procs/api_dev_DeployTool', payload)

call_graphs.name: services.tool-page-load
call_graphs.hint: entry: src/app/(web)/tools/<tool>/page.tsx → await parseToolParams(searchParams) → ToolService.getInstance().getPageData(pageID) → MPHelper.executeProcedureWithBody('api_Tools_GetPageData', {'@PageID': id}) → pageData attached to ToolParams

call_graphs.name: address-labels.fetch
call_graphs.hint: entry: src/components/address-labels/actions.ts:fetchAddressLabels → auth.api.getSession → (selection mode) UserService.getUserIdByGuid + ToolService.getSelectionRecordIds + AddressLabelService.getAddressesForContacts (batched 100) OR (single-record) AddressLabelService.getAddressForContact → filterAndTransform (skip rules + household dedup + postal sort) → FetchAddressLabelsResult

call_graphs.name: address-labels.pdf
call_graphs.hint: entry: handleGenerate → actions.ts:generateLabelPdf → preEncodeBarcodes → LabelDocument → getLabelPosition → @react-pdf/renderer pdf().toBlob() → base64 → client Blob → window.open

call_graphs.name: address-labels.mail-merge
call_graphs.hint: entry: mail-merge-tab.tsx:handleMerge → actions.ts:mergeTemplate → preEncodeBarcodes → imbBarcodeToBmp|postnetBarcodeToBmp → PizZip(templateBuffer) → Docxtemplater with image module → render({ addresses }) → base64 → client download 'merged-letters.docx'

call_graphs.name: template-editor.mjml-compile
call_graphs.hint: entry: editor-code-dialog.tsx:handleCompileHtml → actions.ts:compileMjml ('use server') → auth.api.getSession → dynamic import('mjml') → mjml2html

call_graphs.name: template-editor.render
call_graphs.hint: entry: src/app/(web)/tools/templateeditor/page.tsx → template-editor.tsx → template-editor-form.tsx → dynamic import editor-canvas.tsx:EditorCanvas → @grapesjs/react:GjsEditor + grapesjs + grapesjs-mjml

call_graphs.name: group-wizard.create
call_graphs.hint: entry: tools/groupwizard/page.tsx:default → GroupWizard → handleSubmit → actions.ts:createGroup → auth.api.getSession → UserService.getUserIdByGuid → GroupService.createGroup → prepareForApi (date coercion) → MPHelper.createTableRecords('Groups', ..., { $userId })

call_graphs.name: group-wizard.edit-hydration
call_graphs.hint: entry: tools/groupwizard/group-wizard.tsx useEffect → actions.ts:fetchGroupRecord → GroupService.getGroup → MPHelper.getTableRecords('Groups') → form.reset(data). Display maps NOT seeded.

call_graphs.name: dev-panel.selection-resolution
call_graphs.hint: entry: selection-panel.tsx → resolveSelection (selection-actions.ts) → UserService.getUserIdByGuid → ToolService.getSelectionRecordIds → MPHelper.executeProcedureWithBody('api_Common_GetSelection') → bubbles recordIds to ContactRecordsPanel

call_graphs.name: dev-panel.contact-resolution
call_graphs.hint: entry: contact-records-panel.tsx → resolveContactRecords → ToolService.resolveContactIds → MPHelper.getTableRecords (batched 100)

call_graphs.name: dev-panel.user-tools-auth-check
call_graphs.hint: entry: user-tools-panel.tsx → getUserTools → UserService.getUserIdByGuid → ToolService.getUserTools → MPHelper.executeProcedureWithBody('api_Tools_GetUserTools') → client computes isAuthorized from NEXT_PUBLIC_PROD_URL + pathname

call_graphs.name: field-management.save
call_graphs.hint: entry: tools/fieldmanagement/field-management.tsx:handleSave → editorRef.getSavePayload() → actions.ts:savePageFieldOrder → FieldManagementService.updatePageFieldOrder → MPHelper.executeProcedureWithBody('api_MPNextTools_UpdatePageFieldOrder') batched x5

call_graphs.name: field-management.load
call_graphs.hint: entry: field-management.tsx:handlePageSelect → actions.ts:fetchPageFieldData → Promise.all([FieldManagementService.getPageFields (api_MPNextTools_GetPageFields), FieldManagementService.getTableMetadata]) → merge unmapped columns with negative IDs → PageFieldData

call_graphs.name: services.record-create-generic
call_graphs.hint: entry: form submit → server action → Service.getInstance() → Service.createX → MPHelper.createTableRecords({ schema, $userId }) → Zod schema.parse → provider → TableService → MP API POST /tables/<table>

call_graphs.name: request.error-path
call_graphs.hint: entry: Service.method → HttpClient.get/post → fetch !ok → logger.error({status, statusText, url, body}) → throw Error('${METHOD} ${endpoint} failed: ${status} ${statusText} - ${body}') → propagates through Service → MPHelper → server action → client

call_graphs.name: token.refresh-error-path
call_graphs.hint: entry: Service.method → client.ensureValidToken → getClientCredentialsToken → fetch rejects or !ok → throw Error('Failed to get client credentials token') → caught client.ts:63 → logger.error → re-throw → propagates, no retry
